title: Dev-HUD
description: Display in game time, coordinates, and death coordinates.
body:
Display in game time, coordinates, and death coordinates.
Each options can be configured in a chat menu.

**Initializes the datapack**
```
/trigger dev_hud
```

**Displays the menu that allows you to configure the datapack**

```
/trigger dev_hud_menu
```

**Uninstall the datapack by removing all scoreboards and tags**

```
/trigger dev_hud_uninstall

```
